summary: Phase D3 - RequirementHistoryDrawer & Request Lifecycle Visibility testing complete. All features working correctly. Backend API returns unified timeline with document_uploaded, check_recorded, document_verified events. Frontend drawer opens from both Evidence and Check row history buttons, displays events with correct badges and colors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase D3 RequirementHistoryDrawer complete. History drawer opens from Evidence and Check rows, shows unified timeline with document_uploaded, check_recorded, document_verified, verify_requirement, unverify_requirement, remove_evidence events. Badge colors working correctly (green for verified/check, blue for requests, amber for superseded).

unified_history_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/requirements/{key}/unified-history returns timeline with all event types

evidence_key_mapping.details: right_to_work_evidence maps to right_to_work_documents, dbs_evidence maps to dbs_certificate

check_key_history.details: right_to_work_check and dbs_status_check return check_recorded events with method and outcome

history_drawer_from_evidence_row.details: Clicking history button on Evidence row opens RequirementHistoryDrawer with correct title and events

history_drawer_from_check_row.details: Clicking history button on Check row opens RequirementHistoryDrawer with check_recorded events

document_uploaded_events.details: Timeline shows document_uploaded events from employee_documents collection

check_recorded_events.details: Timeline shows check_recorded events with method (share_code_online_check, manual_passport_check, update_service_check) and outcome (verified, failed, awaiting_review)

event_badges.details: Badges display with correct colors - green for verified/check_recorded, blue for requests, amber for superseded

empty_history_state.details: DBS Certificate Evidence shows 'No history recorded yet' when no events exist

total_events_count.details: Drawer footer shows correct total events count (e.g., '15 events in history')

event_types: check_recorded with method and outcome details
